TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Md. Abdul Hamid == ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Md. Abdul Hamid, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Bangladesh ta' misuw hya' ga Md. Abdul Hamid, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Md. Abdul Hamid sa kawas 1970, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Rashida Hamid ga, kneril ni Md. Abdul Hamid. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == m*. aő≤*ul ńßami* == rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, m*. aő≤*ul ńßami*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤aŇčla*es~…ēńß ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a m*. aő≤*ul ńßami*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja m*. aő≤*ul ńßami* s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. qnxan nja ras~…ēńßi*a ńßami* …£a, kneril ni m*. aő≤*ul ńßami*. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Md. Abdul Hamid == ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Md. Abdul Hamid, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Bangladesh ta' misuw hya' ga Md. Abdul Hamid, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Md. Abdul Hamid sa kawas 1970, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Rashida Hamid ga, kneril ni Md. Abdul Hamid. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == m*. aő≤*ul ńßami* == rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, m*. aő≤*ul ńßami*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤aŇčla*es~…ēńß ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a m*. aő≤*ul ńßami*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja m*. aő≤*ul ńßami* s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. qnxan nja ras~…ēńßi*a ńßami* …£a, kneril ni m*. aő≤*ul ńßami*. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
